instruction: Extract all core computer science concepts from the following lecture JSON. Return only a newline-separated list of unique concepts. Do not explain anything.

text_blocks.text: Most network applications are based on the client-server model:

runs.text: Most network applications are based on the

Server provides service by manipulating resource for clients

text_blocks.text: WAN (Wide Area Network) spans country or world

runs.text: WAN (Wide Area Network) spans country or world

text_blocks.text: How is it possible to send bits across incompatible LANs and WANs?

text_blocks.text: Solution:  protocol software running on each host and router

runs.text: software running on each host and router

text_blocks.text: Protocol is a set of rules that governs how hosts and routers should cooperate when they transfer data from network to network.

when they transfer data from network to network.
